metadata.name: Searing Touch with buyback returns to hand
metadata.description: P1 casts Searing Touch ({R}) with buyback paid ({4} additional), targeting P2. Total cost is {4}{R}. Both players pass priority. Searing Touch resolves, dealing 1 damage to P2 (40 -> 39), and per CR 702.27a the card is placed into P1's hand instead of the graveyard. Asserts: P2 life is 39, Searing Touch is in P1's hand, graveyard is empty, stack is empty.
metadata.generation_notes: Tests the buyback mechanic end-to-end. Searing Touch oracle text: 'Buyback {4}. Searing Touch deals 1 damage to any target.' Card definition uses AbilityDefinition::Buyback { cost } and Effect::DealDamage targeting any target. CR 702.27a: 'If the buyback cost was paid, put this spell into its owner's hand instead of into that player's graveyard as it resolves.' Total mana cost with buyback: base {R} + additional {4} = {4}{R}. P1 starts with {colorless: 4, red: 1} in their mana pool (pre-tapped lands) to pay the full cost. The cast_spell action includes buyback: true so the harness passes cast_with_buyback: true to the engine Command::CastSpell, which records was_buyback_paid on the stack object. At resolution (resolution.rs), the engine checks was_buyback_paid and routes the card to the owner's hand per CR 702.27a instead of the graveyard. After resolution: P2 goes from 40 to 39 (1 damage per CR 120.3); Searing Touch is in P1's hand (not graveyard) per CR 702.27a; graveyard is empty.

script.step_note: P1 casts Searing Touch with buyback paid, targeting P2

actions.description: Initial: Searing Touch in P1 hand, P2 at 40 life, graveyard empty

actions.note: CR 601.2 + 601.2b: P1 casts Searing Touch with buyback cost {4} paid as an additional cost. Total cost {4}{R} paid from mana pool. P2 is the target. buyback: true tells the harness to set cast_with_buyback on the engine Command.

actions.description: After casting: Searing Touch on stack, P1 hand empty
actions.note: Searing Touch is on the stack; buyback flag is set indicating the additional cost was paid.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 120.3: Searing Touch deals 1 damage to target player P2.

actions.note: CR 608.2 + 702.27a: Spell resolves; 1 damage dealt to P2; because buyback cost was paid, Searing Touch is placed into P1's hand instead of the graveyard.

actions.description: After resolution: P2 at 39 life, Searing Touch back in P1 hand, graveyard empty, stack empty
actions.note: CR 702.27a: Buyback cost was paid, so Searing Touch returns to P1's hand rather than going to the graveyard. P2 took 1 damage (40 -> 39).
